review_text:
Michelle at Tatt2Away Austin is a competent and kind technician with a great sense of humor! She has had 25 years of experience previously as an aesthetician, and brings her valuable insights to the process. She makes the process accessible and answers your questions without making you feel dumb, and adds a touch of humor where she can. Plus, she is so kind to make sure that your comfort is her top priority! I can say with confidence that you will be in great hands with her. :-) I highly recommend her!

Edit, Dec 2025:

I also have been treated by the new technician, Tatyana, who is very kind and knowledgeable about aesthetician work. She was trained by Michelle (who has been promoted) and she is excellent, now running this Austin location. Tatyana was thoughtful about my needs during the procedure and did it without wasting time and did it well.

You will be in great hands with her!

review_text:
I wanted to love this process, but unfortunately ended up with permanent scarring and a tattoo that looks far worse than it did prior to coming here. I paid $1800 for 4 treatments. I used 2 and neither worked, only made matters worse. They only will refund $600 of the unused $900, no refunds for the 2 treatments that didn’t work/caused serious scarring. Now I’m paying to see a dermatologist and next week a consultation for laser treatment for the scarring.
I really hate to leave negative reviews for places but please do more research than I did prior to considering this route. Unfortunately, I decided to read all of the Reddit reviews AFTER the fact and per reviews it’s not uncommon for this to happen.

review_text:
I got a tattoo that I love but it's just bigger than what I would like for it to be. I went with Tatt2away bc of the more natural approach. Michelle is such a sweet, kind, and thoughtful person. She answered all my questions. I felt comfortable and opened up to her about my picking and scratching coping mechanism. She told me it would be a waste of money if I picked at the scabs and she wouldn't do the treatment if I felt like I wouldn't refrain from it. To have someone so honest means a lot to me.
The treatment -- it really isn't as bad as getting the tattoo -- the anticipation is worst.
I've done 1 treatment and it really just feels like a bad sunburn. I honestly thought it was going to look and feel a lot worst than what it is so far. I will keep y'all updated. 😊💗
Photos are initial, 24 hours after, and 48 hours after.

review_text:
I recently discovered that I've developed an allergy to my own tattoo ink. It's been a long hard road, months of trying to figure out what's going on, and being referred from PCP, to Dermatology, to Allergist. Considering my situation, the thought of laser was especially not appealing. In fact, my Allergist warned that it may send me into shock, disbursing the ink throughout my body..

I had never even heard of T2A before all this (how??), but they have been so helpful. They scheduled a free consult, heard out my concerns, took notes of all my allergies, and even spoke to my Allergist to ensure they were being careful and considerate. They took their time and weren't just in a rush to get me on the books, taking my money even if it may not be good for me in my specific situation. You know?

Michelle has been great (everyone has). It was so good getting to meet her, the place was clean and organized, I got plenty of resource and information regarding care before/during/after, and she's been keeping in contact to make sure things are going well. I feel very fortunate to have even had this option so close to me.

Thank you for what you do. I'm sure you can't always guarantee how any given body will handle these things, but from my experience, I appreciate all of your time, attention to detail, and genuine care. Sincerely.
review_date_label: Jul 02, 2024 (verified from SerpAPI iso_date, last edited Jul 02, 2024)

review_text:
I do not recommend this company for tattoo removal. My first experience was on March 22nd and the technician, Maggie, was absolutely amazing. She took the time to explain the process to me and reassure me of any fears I had going in. She was very gentle, and pleasant and showed she cared not only about my tattoo horrible story, but the integrity of my skin. I had 2 services with her and each time was better than the last!
However, I’ve since tried to rebook Maggie and have sadly been informed that she is no longer employed there. I did receive treatment from one other technician since Maggie’s departure and I must say, my skin is swollen, painful and I fear I may walk away from this session with scars which was never a concern before. The woman that worked on me was not very nice, quick with the process and seemed like she could care less about the integrity of my skin and if I were to scar.
As a licensed esthetician in the service industry, I know a good worker when I see one and Maggie was that, the other lady, who I didn’t care to remember her name of, was not. I unfortunately will not be returning as I do worry about my skin health and I do not feel valued as a customer.
review_date_label: May 31, 2024 (verified from SerpAPI iso_date, last edited May 31, 2024)

review_text:
I can’t express enough how thrilled I am with my experience at Tat2Away, specifically with Mandy. From start to finish, Mandy exhibited the utmost professionalism, skill, and compassion, making my tattoo removal journey an absolute breeze.

First and foremost, Mandy’s expertise in tattoo removal is unparalleled. She took the time to thoroughly explain the process, answering all of my questions and alleviating any concerns I had. Her meticulous approach instilled confidence in me from the get-go.

Throughout each session, Mandy’s attention to detail was evident. She ensured that I was comfortable and informed every step of the way, making the process surprisingly comfortable. Her gentle demeanor and reassuring presence truly made a difference, especially during those initial sessions when I was a bit apprehensive.

Moreover, the results speak for themselves. Thanks to Mandy’s skillful technique and dedication, my tattoo has faded significantly with each session, exceeding my expectations. I’m beyond grateful for her expertise and the incredible results she has achieved.

Beyond her technical proficiency, Mandy’s empathy and kindness truly set her apart. She genuinely cares about her clients and goes above and beyond to make them feel valued and supported throughout the entire process. Her warmth and positivity made what could have been a daunting experience incredibly positive and empowering.

In conclusion, I wholeheartedly recommend Mandy at Tat2Away for anyone considering tattoo removal. Not only is she a master of her craft, but she’s also a wonderful person who genuinely cares about her clients’ well-being. Thank you, Mandy, for making this journey so rewarding. You’ve gained a lifelong fan in me!

If anyone is skeptical of this process or this company, please reach out to me personally, and I would be happy to give more detail
review_date_label: May 03, 2024 (verified from SerpAPI iso_date, last edited May 03, 2024)

review_text:
This company's technology looks amazing, and to its credit it may very well be a wonderful thing, HOWEVER, my personal experience with the clinic has convinced me that this is a very disorganized company, and furthermore one whose moral compass in terms of rational decision making is not skewed in a direction I admire.

After some initial phone tag, I was able to book an appointment for a first treatment with this clinic some weeks ago. However, because of the fact that I chose to be completely honest with my medical history at the time and disclosed that I believe I have a mild hypermobility syndrome (something I certainly could have kept secret if I’d known the trouble it would cause), my appointment was abruptly cancelled by the upper management due to (I would say extremely paranoid) concerns about liability issues. Please note, nothing on the website currently mentions that folks with a hypermobility disorder will be summarily rejected from treatment!!

Notably, I was not given any kind of say during this cancellation process. What irked me the most was I was not allowed to be part of any kind of conversation with management/the medical staff, despite the fact that this was a session that had been PROMISED to me and already BOOKED! And all this despite the fact that the tech who I had initially talked to said she was personally confident in and happy to give me the procedure despite the liability concerns, which she agreed were over the top given that I not only did not mind the idea of scarring, I actually thought it sounded cool were it to occur (I am a fan of the art form of scarification) and was willing to sign any kind of waiver to get the procedure done.

Finally, it was extremely puzzling and upsetting to me that my appointment was cancelled essentially behind my back and the only notification I got of the cancellation was an extremely vague text message saying “I spoke with our medical staff and just had a few things I wanted to touch base with you on.” Well, I had no idea what news was waiting in store for me, I figured the “few things” were just bureaucratic details, but I indeed tried calling back for several days in a row after this message. However, I was met with the answering machine each time (it seems like their phones are generally understaffed), and there was never any more personalized follow up from the clinic’s side. In other words, *I* had to chase THEM to finally get the confirmation that my appointment had indeed been cancelled since they didn’t have the courage(?)/common sense to tell me up front in the text they sent??? So, if I had not diligently followed up in this manner, I very well could have showed up to my appointment only to be told ON THE SPOT that my session had been cancelled without my knowledge or approval – and keep in mind, I am not living in Chicago full time right now so I was building my entire travel schedule around this one appointment.

Finally – and this is where it gets truly hilarious – weeks after the snafu with my cancelled appointment, I get a “follow up” text to an old message I had sent before scheduling the appointment saying “sorry this message got buried, when would you like to continue the conversation about booking?” I am no longer truly upset and can laugh about this now, but this company obviously needs to do some serious work in terms of client communications, PR, and staying on top of patient history.

Furthermore, it is unfortunately apparently so obsessed about liability issues that it can’t make a rational exception to take on a sane adult client in good faith (although I guess that’s the age we live in, thanks #america). It also seems to be totally insensitive to the psychological damage and upset it might be causing a prospective (and then later rejected) client by the snowball effect of such vague, contradictory, and misguided messages! Sorry, Tatt2Away, I wanted to love you - but come on, this is basic client rapport skills, 101!
review_date_label: May 02, 2024 (verified from SerpAPI iso_date, last edited May 02, 2024)

review_text:
Absolutely horrible experience. A close family member went here for tattoo removal and was left with severe scarring despite following every single aftercare instruction exactly as directed.

This procedure was significantly more painful than professional laser removal, yet delivered far worse results. Instead of fading the tattoo, it caused lasting damage that now requires laser treatment to fix the harm done here.

If you’re considering tattoo removal, do yourself a favor and look elsewhere. Read the other reviews carefully and consult a licensed laser removal provider instead. This place caused permanent consequences that could have been avoided.
review_date_label: Feb 13, 2025 (verified from SerpAPI iso_date, last edited Jan 12, 2026)

review_text: AVOID TATT2AWAY. My first and only session was Spring 2022. After proper aftercare and nearly four years later, the ink is mostly gone in the treated spots but I am also left with some hypertrophic scars from the procedure. If I were to continue with the removal process for the entire tattoo, I would choose laser or some other method, especially since its on my finger which has more sensitive and thinner skin more prone to scarring. Overall not impressed with the long-term results and wish I did more research before spending my money here. (The last photo was taken April 22, 2022, sometime after the procedure, the first two photos are fully healed December 2025)

review_text:
***responding to their response…
It is simply not true that they have received no response from me. I text them on March 11th and after not hearing back, I sent a bubble “?”  To my text about scarring. After several days I received a text that I will have to come in and asked what time works best, which was just a few days ago. So the fact that they are saying they have made several attempts and haven't received a response is just simply not true.
Also them saying the pictures I attached are the ones showing irritations is also false. I didn’t even post those pictures original, I now have irritated photos posted. The pictures I posted are 2 months past my last appt. I have taken extremely good care of the wound (cause that is what it is) and the pictures are after all that extra care. That is the pictures of it healed! Which is why I text them about the scarring. You shouldn’t have to use tegaderm to not have scarring. This “tattoo removal” will scar you!

DO NOT get tattoo removal here! You will be left with a permanent scar where your tattoo was.

It’s appalling that this company is still operating. Their practices are not just unethical, but downright harmful. They are knowingly scarring their clients and should be shut down immediately! Avoid this company at all costs!

And for those that are thinking that I am just an angry customer and that there are enough good reviews to give it a try…I would encourage you to notice that none of the “good” reviews have before and after pictures. How would anyone give a good review for being permanently scarred??

These pics show the different stages. I have had 3 treatments and will never go back. This is the scar I am left with. 😖😔😡
review_date_label: Apr 02, 2025 (verified from SerpAPI iso_date, last edited Apr 07, 2025)

review_text:
Did two treatments - with little changes after each session. Was charged $1000 for two sessions. It is $500 per session. It would probably take 10+ sessions to remove at this rate. Laser is cheaper and much faster than the 3-hour painful appointments.

I was also ghosted with no response during what was supposed to be my follow-up for 1 whole month before I was told my person had left the company. Just not a good experience, unfortunately all around. 10+ hours wasted. Lots of pain and 1k out of money with the entire tattoo still there... :(
review_date_label: Jan 23, 2025 (verified from SerpAPI iso_date, last edited Jan 23, 2025)

review_text: My experience at Tatt2away here in Draper has been wonderful! I’m grateful I found tatt2away and for the kindness and help that Mandy has shown me. Thank you!

review_text: Absolute worst place. My first appointment, Jazz forgot to give me her number after telling me to send her pictures of how my tattoo removal was healing in the next few days. I was calling the office with questions and trying to get her number, and no one answered. It wasn’t until she contacted me over a month later, saying she needed to do our next visit over the phone because she wasn’t going to be in the office, that i finally got her number. Setting up appointments afterwards was horrible, and took forever to actually get a response no matter how many times I called and texted. The whole process was taking so much longer than necessary. Eventually she got some help, but by then I had decided I was done with her forgetfulness and unprofessionalism. It’s not worth it. Get laser or a tattoo cover up honestly. By far the worst experience. No questions were answered, always rushed, and it was a WASTE.
review_date_label: Nov 16, 2024 (verified from SerpAPI iso_date, last edited Nov 16, 2024)

review_text: Mandy was awesome! She explained everything and was very nice in helping me feel comfortable. Tattoo removal was smooth and seamless.
review_date_label: Oct 17, 2024 (verified from SerpAPI iso_date, last edited Oct 17, 2024)

review_text: I used this service to remove my eyebrow Microblading. I would not recommend it. I only went through with one of the two treatments, as the healing was so long, and I had vertical striped scabs that were very obvious. The striped scabs were to be expected, but the healing time was longer than expected. It also didn’t fully remove the ink in any of the strips that were treated. I also have slight scarring (pink, depressed skin). I started laser treatment today, and this seems like a much better and safer approach. I also contacted Tatt2away to ask for a partial refund since it didn’t remove my ink, and I wouldn’t be going through with the second prepaid treatment. I understand I signed a contract, but it would be good business practice and customer service to offer partial (half) refund.
review_date_label: Sep 23, 2024 (verified from SerpAPI iso_date, last edited Sep 23, 2024)

review_text: I started my journey with Tatt2Away just two days ago and from the consultation to now I am completely impressed with the professionalism of Mandy Morrell who was my aesthetician. She is incredibly educated and was very kind to me. The office is EXTREMELY clean which is always a plus. I’m looking forward to our next session and for someone who doesn’t like lasers this was the place for me and I highly recommend it if you are looking to remove tattoos. The process is really exciting and physically I even feel better since my first session. Again, this is a great place to go if you are really serious about removing tattoos and Mandy Morrell is Amazing! Thank you Tatt2Away 💕

review_text: This tattoo removal process is really interesting.  Tons of tiny little holes that heal the tattoo ink off your body.  I found the procedure to be pretty painless, definitely less than getting the tattoo.  The after care is long and tedious, but what do you expect from a removal?  I stuck to the letter on the aftercare and have clean, new, unscarred skin.  It works!  Also, better than burning yourself with a laser!  Jazz is fun and the shop is clean.  I recommend.

review_text: Tatt2away completely mutilated by 18 year olds arm. She went back to the clinic and they said she was having a “reaction”. After several visits with the dermatologist the doctor confirmed that it wasn’t a reaction, it was a completely botched tattoo removal that has left her with extreme keloid scars on her whole arm. The staff did not try to help her or offer her a refund or anything! Just a completely unconcerned well, your body is reacting. What an inhumane response to hurting such a young one so badly. She is undergoing medical treatment from the damage they caused but she will ultimately be scarred for life. For anyone considering this clinic I would stay well away. The damage they caused is severe and their unconcerned attitude regarding how badly they hurt her and botched the job shows TERRIBLE ethics. This photo is months post treatment. She will have these hard raised scars for life. It also seems like the business is flagging and removing negative reviews as this review is no longer publicly available. Wow.

Had a great first session removing the tattoo off my back that I’ve had for over 20+ years. Zac did a great job of explaining the process. Sara did a great job of helping me through the first session- going slow, explaining the process, and making me as comfortable as possible during the laser. I can already see the scar slightly faded after the first round. Had some discomfort after the first treatment, but the next day could hardly feel anything. Will update this review once I’m finished removing the tattoo

I truly had the best experience here - Tattoo removal can be spicy, and they made me feel SO comfortable and confident here. I feel like I can actually handle my tattoo removal journey now - not to be dramatic! It was clean and thoughtfully curated, everyone I interacted with was so friendly and genuinely interested in my experience and making sure I felt comfortable at my appointment. I can’t say enough good things and again, I’m so much more confident in getting my tattoos removed after coming here.
such great service, they really know what they’re doing!
It was such a pleasure to meet Zach! He thoroughly explained the process and walked me through the pricing. I am so excited to get started with them.
I’ve been going to Removery for a little over a year now and the team is absolutely marvelous. Always so warm and welcoming when I come in. Wish I had more tattoos I needed to remove 😅
Everyone was so professional and Sarah made it quick as possible. Much recommended for tattoo removal
Well done!

So very helpful and informative. Had a consultation and was thoroughly informed on the process and what my journey is going to look like and felt comfortable throughout. So relieving that Removery exists. Looking forward to my first scheduled treatment! :)

A client of mine referred me to The Removery and I couldn’t be happier! I was thrilled that they offer payment plans and total removal packages. The staff (South Congress location) was very friendly and made the process easy and seamless. They’ve been great with explaining the process and walking me through the steps, which put me much more at ease. I just did my third session and I’m very happy to see my tattoo fading after each visit.  I am trusting the process even though it’s a lengthy one, I know I’m in good hands!
Sarah is quick and attentive. Super grateful because the removal can be painful but her patience helps make it less painful.
Slowly working.  Takes 10+ treatments

Zac, Melaina, and Sarah have taken such great care of me every step of my tattoo removal journey. People ask me all the time if the laser hurts - honestly - not really, and it’s over in a literal flash for my smallish tattoos. If you could handle the feeling of getting the tattoo, you can handle this. Lovely people, great service!

The South Congress team is always so kind and attentive. They work hard to accommodate their clients and I feel so comfortable at my appointments. I know I’m in great hands and truly admire their tenacity being a small team! Big thank you to y’all!
Super quick and friendly environment!
Nicest people in the world and really great work :)
I love the team at removery. Always great conversations and they make you as comfortable as possible for your procedure.

Went to south congress location. Very friendly and knowledgeable staff. Consultation went great, Zac did very well in explaining the process. I will  be sending many people over for removals so they can share the same great experience.
I am impressed with the office staff. They were very friendly. So glad I found them!

New Review: I’ve been working with Zac and Sarah for 2 years now for complete removal! They are literally the best to work with. They not only love what they do but they love helping people feel more confident and beautiful no matter if you have a good or a bad tattoo! I’m thinking about getting another crappy tattoo just so I can continue to see them 😂 love you both to the moon and thank you for making my experience top notch!

Previous Review: I worked with Zac in the beginning to answer any questions I had. He never pressured me into making a decision. When I did decide to start, he was still just as friendly and comforting with answering all of the questions I still had! Sarah did my first session and she was so kind and talked me through it! I love feeling comfortable with these types of things, so it makes it extra seamless. I’ve now had a few sessions and I learn something new every time! Thank you!

I'm so excited I started my removal service with Removery! Zac and Danielle made my first appointment so easy - I was able to be quoted and seen all in day 1!

Although the service isn't the most comfortable, it's easier than sitting hours in a tattoo chair. It took less than 1 minute to complete both.  I wouldn't recommend this service to anyone who is unhappy with tattoos on their body.

Absolutely amazing team: straight forward intake and exciting first treatment.

Zac did amazing at making sure I understood both the procedure and science behind it. Felt really at ease to ask questions but didn’t have any as it was all very straightforward. He also did amazing at setting expectations based on the size and color of my tattoo.

Getting the laser down was also just as straight forward. Sarah checked in regularly and made sure I was okay. I didn’t need her to take any breaks, but depending on where you have your tattoo you might need a few more.

She was also great at explaining the aftercare to me along with giving me a bag that had all the same details. That’s better than most doctors offices.

Highly recommend.
they literally never answer the phone. It's actually so annoying.
Always enjoy my appointments, it’s not the most fun feeling BUT the personalities of the employees help a ton!
Great appointment, the process can be a bit uncomfortable, but the associate was Patient and informative to help frame my experience.

I had my first session at Removery and I’m honestly so impressed with the experience. From the moment I walked in, the staff made me feel comfortable, welcomed, and well taken care of. They took the time to explain the entire tattoo removal process, answered all my questions, and made sure I felt at ease before getting started.

The treatment itself was quick and way more manageable than I expected. The technician was very gentle, professional, and checked in with me throughout the session to make sure I was doing okay. I also really appreciated how clean and organized everything was — it made me feel confident I chose the right place.

Even after just the first visit, I feel excited to continue the process. If you’re nervous about starting tattoo removal, this is definitely the place to go. Great service, knowledgeable staff, and a very positive first experience!

The staff here is super sweet and very accommodating! In the middle of getting my tattoos removed, and it has been a very easy process. I'm five sessions in and I'm definitely seeing a big difference in the amount of ink that's on my arms and I'm excited to continue to process--They have been very flexible with me on scheduling my sessions And getting me in in a timely manner.

Love going here! Zack and Melania are awesome (everyone is awesome there, bad with names)! My sessions are showing a lot of improvement and I’m at the point where I can barely even feel it. Sessions are so quick too. Zack is great with consults and makes sure your payment plan is realistic to your income. (Was a college student when I started sessions and could afford it) Overall, amazing studio.

My experience has been great and would definitely recommend. Getting the unlimited package will save you a lot of money and get you the best results. I see Sarah & she is awesome, she makes my treatment go fast and easy!

Z-A-C is the M-V-P I’m so sorry it’s taken so long to leave this review, but I couldn’t be on this journey without you! And Sarah is cool too :)

Sorry I don’t know if I’ve ever left a Google review before, but here it goes !!

Zac heard and connected with me as a person, not just a number or a sale. He really took the time to sit and explain things to me, listen to me, and care about my concerns and needs. He did such a phenomenal job I was speechless and almost in tears at how kind and awesome he is. I wish there were more people like him in the world. He is so nice and understanding, cares about people and helping them achieve their dreams with their tattoo removals. Words cannot express how awesome I think he is, and how great he is at his job !! If I could give him 100 stars I would. He is the reason I’m able to be doing my removal which is so important to me. I literally couldn’t have done this without him and I am forever grateful.

Sarah was also so sweet and made me feel comfortable during my near-painless experience. It was quick and easy, and she took good care of me too. So far it’s been great with her and I give her a 5 star rating as well ! I am looking forward to more sessions with her as I trust her and know I’m in good hands ! I’m thrilled for this opportunity and thank both of y’all from the bottom of my heart !!
